# Virtual Teammate

> Virtual Teammate is a US-owned, HIPAA-compliant virtual assistant staffing agency headquartered in Phoenix, Arizona. It places skilled, EHR/PMS-trained virtual assistants inside medical practices, dental practices, and growing businesses across the United States, matched to the client's US time zone. Engagements are scoped against client-chosen KPIs and measured on value created, not hours billed.

## Key facts

- **Company:** Virtual Teammate (US-owned, HIPAA-compliant VA staffing agency)
- **Headquarters:** 2425 East Camelback Road, Suite 400, Phoenix, AZ 85016, USA
- **Phone:** (480) 847-2498
- **Email:** clientsuccess@virtualteammate.com
- **Pricing:** Flat-rate, all-in. From $750 bi-weekly full-time ($400 part-time). Specialist tier (medical/dental billing & coding) $1,000 bi-weekly full-time ($600 part-time). Typically up to 73% less than an equivalent in-house hire (no benefits, payroll tax, recruiter fees or PTO).
- **Speed:** Curated shortlist in ~2 business days; teammate live in 1–2 weeks.
- **Guarantee:** 30-Day Right-Fit Promise — not the right fit in month one, we replace at no cost or refund every billed day. Month-to-month after the first 90 days; no long-term lock-in.
- **Talent:** Sourced from a global network (Philippines, Latin America, Africa, South Asia), vetted, HIPAA-certified, matched to the client's specialty, software, accent and US time-zone shift.
- **Compliance:** HIPAA training & certification before any PHI access, BAA-compatible confidentiality agreements, encrypted devices, least-privilege access, 12-month audit trail.
- **Proof points:** 4.9 average Google rating; 95%+ first-pass clean-claim rate; 95%+ client retention; documented KPI results 30–60% over target across billing, verifications, payment posting and pre-certifications.

## Services

### Medical virtual assistants
- [Medical Administrative Support](https://virtualteammate.com/services/medical-administrative-support/): charts, intake, records and admin workflows.
- [Medical Receptionist](https://virtualteammate.com/services/medical-receptionist/): front-desk calls, scheduling and intake.
- [Medical Biller](https://virtualteammate.com/services/medical-biller/): claims, AR follow-up and revenue-cycle management (RCM).
- [Medical Scribe](https://virtualteammate.com/services/medical-scribe/): real-time EHR documentation.
- [Medical Assistant](https://virtualteammate.com/services/medical-assistant/): clinical and administrative support.

### Dental virtual assistants
- [Dental Administrative Support](https://virtualteammate.com/services/dental-admin/): records, verification and treatment-plan prep.
- [Dental Receptionist](https://virtualteammate.com/services/dental-receptionist/): live front-desk calls, scheduling and recall.
- [Dental Biller](https://virtualteammate.com/services/dental-biller/): insurance billing, claims and EOB posting.
- [Dental Scribe](https://virtualteammate.com/services/dental-scribe/): real-time clinical and perio charting.
- [Dental Coordinator](https://virtualteammate.com/services/dental-coordinator/): case acceptance, recall and scheduling.

### Business & non-profit virtual assistants
- [Business & Non-Profit VAs](https://virtualteammate.com/business/): executive assistants, marketing, customer service, bookkeeping and operations support.

## Software fluency

Medical EHRs: Epic, Cerner, eClinicalWorks, Athenahealth and more. Dental PMS: Dentrix, Dentrix Ascend, Open Dental, Curve, Denticon, Carestream, plus clearinghouses including DentalXChange.

## Key pages

- [Homepage](https://virtualteammate.com/): overview, pricing, ROI calculator, live teammate profiles.
- [About](https://virtualteammate.com/about/): company, founder and mission.
- [Case Studies](https://virtualteammate.com/case-studies/): documented client KPI results by workstream.
- [30-Day Right-Fit Promise](https://virtualteammate.com/guarantee/): the no-risk hiring guarantee.
- [Careers](https://virtualteammate.com/careers/): remote VA jobs and the application process.
- [Contact](https://virtualteammate.com/contact/): Phoenix HQ, phone, email and booking.

## Frequently asked

- **HIPAA compliant?** Yes — every teammate completes HIPAA training and certification before placement and is BAA-compatible.
- **How fast to start?** Shortlist in days; live in 1–2 weeks.
- **How much?** From $750 bi-weekly full-time; up to 73% less than an in-house hire.
- **Where are VAs based?** A global network, matched to the client's US time zone.
- **Contracts?** Month-to-month after the first 90 days; covered by the 30-Day Right-Fit Promise.
